candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows dir=SHORT with conv=100% but green_matches=0, the live signal has no historical analog and must be sized down, not up — high live conviction without a memory match is a regime-novelty trap.
testable_rule: if consensus_conv >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.5  # high conviction with zero memory match = novelty trap, halve size
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
